name: Lifelong Multi-Subsystem Pickup and Delivery with Buffer-Limited Handover Stations
summary: arXiv:2607.17724v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Coordinating payload transfers between subsystems is a critical challenge in lifelong Multi-Agent Pickup and Delivery (MAPD). We study systems wher...
description: arXiv:2607.17724v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Coordinating payload transfers between subsystems is a critical challenge in lifelong Multi-Agent Pickup and Delivery (MAPD). We study systems where agents are confined to separate regions and must exchange payloads through shared handover stations. These stations, equipped with single docks and finite buffers, are inherently vulnerable to block...
author: Chuanlong Zang, Isabelle Barz, Anna Mannucci, Philipp Schillinger, Florian Lier, Wolfgang H\"onig
